Issues 81Files 17
94/100Architecture
B
Architecture87/100 · weight 5% · 5ms · 5 issues
high
WhatAnalyzes the import graph to detect structural problems: circular dependencies, god modules (imported by >50% of files), orphan modules (dead code), high fan-out (importing too many modules), and connector modules (high coupling). Generates an SVG architecture diagram.
RiskCircular dependencies create build order issues and make refactoring impossible without breaking changes. God modules become bottlenecks — any change ripples through the entire codebase. High coupling means you can't change one module without testing everything it touches.
FixBreak circular deps by extracting shared types to a separate file. Split god modules by concern. Reduce fan-out by co-locating related code. Use dependency injection for loose coupling.
Patternmodular — Modular architecture — code organized by feature/responsibility.
Ratingfair
Layersclean layering
Coupling75% cross-directory imports
Cohesion27% average internal cohesion
• Clean layering — dependencies flow in one direction without violations.
• High cross-coupling (75%) — packages depend heavily on each other.
• 1 god module(s) — consider splitting into focused interfaces.

Package Stability (Martin)

web/src
0.41
web/components
0.76
web/services
0.38
I=0 = maximally stable (many dependents, hard to change). I=1 = maximally unstable (no dependents, easy to change).

WGod module: imported by 14/18 files — consider splittinggod-module

web/src/vite-env.d.ts 1
WOrphan: not imported by any file (dead module?)orphan-module
A
Performance100/100 · weight 4% · 4ms · 4 issues
medium
WhatDetects barrel imports that defeat tree-shaking, heavy dependencies with lighter alternatives, static imports of large libraries that could be lazy-loaded, and runtime CSS-in-JS overhead.
RiskBarrel files (index.ts re-exports) prevent bundlers from tree-shaking unused code, bloating bundles by 2-10x. Heavy dependencies like moment.js add 300KB when date-fns does the same in 7KB. Static imports of visualization libraries delay initial page load.
FixReplace barrel re-exports with direct imports. Swap heavy deps for lighter alternatives. Use dynamic import() for large libraries only needed on interaction. Prefer zero-runtime CSS (Tailwind, CSS Modules) over styled-components.
filesScanned18
barrelImports0
heavyDeps0
dynamicOpportunities0
cssInJsRuntime0
web/src/App.tsx 1
I3Large destructured import — if from a barrel, only imported items should be bundledlarge-import

I3Large destructured import — if from a barrel, only imported items should be bundledlarge-import
